'''âz-t-dh''' ('''kazatadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neven|neven]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neven|neven]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-t-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kazatadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizatadh|thizatadh]] || [[word:jizatadh|jizatadh]] || [[word:shizatadh|shizatadh]] || [[word:kizatadh|kizatadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzatadh|thuthuzatadh]] || [[word:jujuzatadh|jujuzatadh]] || [[word:shushuzatadh|shushuzatadh]] || [[word:kukuzatadh|kukuzatadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzatadh|thuzatadh]] || [[word:juzatadh|juzatadh]] || [[word:shuzatadh|shuzatadh]] || [[word:kuzatadh|kuzatadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzatadh|thuzatadh]] || [[word:juzatadh|juzatadh]] || [[word:shuzatadh|shuzatadh]] || [[word:kuzatadh|kuzatadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezatadh|thezatadh]] || [[word:jezatadh|jezatadh]] || [[word:shezatadh|shezatadh]] || [[word:kezatadh|kezatadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozatadh|thothozatadh]] || [[word:jojozatadh|jojozatadh]] || [[word:shoshozatadh|shoshozatadh]] || [[word:kokozatadh|kokozatadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozatadh|thozatadh]] || [[word:jozatadh|jozatadh]] || [[word:shozatadh|shozatadh]] || [[word:kozatadh|kozatadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozatadh|thozatadh]] || [[word:jozatadh|jozatadh]] || [[word:shozatadh|shozatadh]] || [[word:kozatadh|kozatadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzatadh|thĂŠzatadh]] || [[word:jĂŠzatadh|jĂŠzatadh]] || [[word:shĂŠzatadh|shĂŠzatadh]] || [[word:kĂŠzatadh|kĂŠzatadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazatadh|thathazatadh]] || [[word:jajazatadh|jajazatadh]] || [[word:shashazatadh|shashazatadh]] || [[word:kakazatadh|kakazatadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazatadh|thazatadh]] || [[word:jazatadh|jazatadh]] || [[word:shazatadh|shazatadh]] || [[word:kazatadh|kazatadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazatadh|thazatadh]] || [[word:jazatadh|jazatadh]] || [[word:shazatadh|shazatadh]] || [[word:kazatadh|kazatadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazatadh|shazatadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazatadh|goshazatadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazatadh|gokishazatadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazatadhnĂŒ|shazatadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazatadhnknĂŒ|goshazatadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatadhnĂŒ|gokishazatadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazatadhshĂ«|shazatadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkshĂ«|goshazatadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazatadhshĂ«|gokishazatadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatadhro|shazatadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkro|goshazatadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatadhro|gokishazatadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatadhmu|shazatadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkmu|goshazatadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatadhmu|gokishazatadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazatadhsher|shazatadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazatadhnksher|goshazatadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazatadhsher|gokishazatadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazatadhng|shazatadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkng|goshazatadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazatadhng|gokishazatadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazatadhya|shazatadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkya|goshazatadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazatadhya|gokishazatadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazatadhyam|shazatadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkyam|goshazatadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazatadhyam|gokishazatadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazatadhnĂŒshĂ«|shazatadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazatadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazatadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazatadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazatadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatadhnĂŒro|shazatadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatadhnknĂŒro|goshazatadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatadhnĂŒro|gokishazatadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatadhnĂŒmu|shazatadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatadhnknĂŒmu|goshazatadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatadhnĂŒmu|gokishazatadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazatadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shazatadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazatadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazatadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatadhshĂ«ro|shazatadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkshĂ«ro|goshazatadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatadhshĂ«ro|gokishazatadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatadhshĂ«mu|shazatadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkshĂ«mu|goshazatadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatadhshĂ«mu|gokishazatadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazatadhronĂŒ|shazatadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkronĂŒ|goshazatadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatadhronĂŒ|gokishazatadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazatadhroshĂ«|shazatadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkroshĂ«|goshazatadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazatadhroshĂ«|gokishazatadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatadhromu|shazatadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkromu|goshazatadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatadhromu|gokishazatadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazatadhmunĂŒ|shazatadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkmunĂŒ|goshazatadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatadhmunĂŒ|gokishazatadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazatadhmushĂ«|shazatadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkmushĂ«|goshazatadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazatadhmushĂ«|gokishazatadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatadhmuro|shazatadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatadhnkmuro|goshazatadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatadhmuro|gokishazatadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
